/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/Alg1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/Alg2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/Alg3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/Alg4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/GlobalData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/src/IO.cpp.o -o project
